title: SAP Diagrams Pro — Style Contract
description: Canonical draw.io style string + geometry for every diagram molecule (containers, chips, personas, pills, badges, edges, separators), extracted from SAP's official btp-solution-diagrams libraries and the Lutech exemplar corpus. The single source of truth consumed by the molecule/skeleton/router engine so no style is ever hardcoded in engine sources.

generatedAt.description: Generation date, passed in via --date (never datetime.now) so the artifact is reproducible.

scriptVersion.description: Version of build-style-contract.py that produced this file.

corpus.description: Basenames of the official libraries + exemplar files the styles were extracted from.

palette.description: The SAP Horizon palette the contract normalizes all fill/stroke/font colors to.

molecules.description: Molecule key -> style contract entry. The required keys below MUST all be present; extra keys (e.g. sap-btp-chip) are allowed.

style.description: draw.io mxGraph 'key=value;' style string. Colors are uppercase Horizon hex or 'none'; image payloads are replaced by '@{asset-key}' placeholders resolved from the brand pack at emit time.

geometry.description: Reference geometry from the source cell's mxGeometry plus any derived paddings/gaps.

from.description: Chosen source cell descriptor: file + value/title/id.

notes.description: Selection rationale, derivations, and any documented color/border normalizations.
